The quarterly earnings report shows strong growth across all segments.
Revenue increased by 12% year-over-year, driven primarily by new customer
acquisitions in the enterprise sector. Operating margins improved by 2.3
percentage points due to cost optimisation initiatives.

Key highlights:
- Total revenue: $4.2B (up 12% YoY)
- Operating income: $820M (up 18% YoY)
- New enterprise customers: 340 (up 25% YoY)
- Employee headcount: 18,400 (up 8% YoY)

The board approved a $500M share buyback program to return value to
shareholders. Guidance for the next quarter is for revenue of $4.4–4.5B.
